## Release Governance

- [ ] Linked issues have exactly one `version:X.Y.Z` label and the matching `vX.Y.Z` milestone.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `Unreleased` is updated for user/developer-visible changes, or the PR explains why no entry is needed.
- [ ] Package version and serialized contract versions are treated as separate decisions.
- [ ] Third-party assets are referenced by approved lock/provenance only and are not bundled.
